text: Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. Make yourself at home and don't hesitate to ask questions.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event_helper. Looking forward to your contributions!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience will be a great asset to newer members.
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Thanks for stepping up to help keep things running smoothly.
